sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32098" key="e(kkaipenthkonta/gwnon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑκκαιπεντηκοντάγωνον</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n32098.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">figure of fifty-six sides,</tr_> prob.in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.363a</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀκτωκαι</foreign>-codd.).</sense> </entryFree>
